label: Grand Theft Auto
blurb: San Andreas to Liberty City. Name who said it — no cheat codes.

quotes.hint: Coming back to the cul-de-sac after five years away
The meme, minus the swear — same scene

quotes.q: All you had to do was follow the damn train, CJ!
quotes.hint: Two decades of mission-failed frustration in one line

quotes.q: I'll have two number 9s, a number 9 large…
quotes.hint: The drive-thru order that never ends

quotes.q: You forget a thousand things every day. Make sure this is one of them.
quotes.hint: Corrupt advice from the back seat of a cop car

quotes.q: Perhaps here, things will be different.
quotes.hint: Stepping off the boat into Liberty City
The phone call players learned to dread

quotes.q: Why did I move here? I guess it was the weather.
quotes.hint: Poolside ennui, straight from the first trailer

lore.question: Which real city inspires the sprawl beneath the Vinewood sign?
Liberty City is modeled on which real city?
lore.hint: Statue of Happiness in the harbor

lore.question: Vice City takes place in which year?
lore.hint: Neon, pastel suits, and a radio full of synth

lore.question: What color flies over Grove Street?
lore.hint: Families colors — Ballas wear the other one

lore.question: How many playable protagonists does GTA V have?
lore.hint: A retiree, a repo man, and a menace

lore.question: Which entry was the series' first fully 3D game?
What business does Roman run in Liberty City?
lore.hint: His American dream, frequently on fire

lore.question: Which mountain looms over San Andreas with a mystery mural?
lore.hint: Cable car up, jetpack rumors all the way down

lore.question: What is the name of CJ's gang?
